Operation 'listRedisRules' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are identical and overly vague. They lack context about what Redis rules are (access control rules), what the operation returns (array of rules with details), and when an AI agent should use this operation. Enhanced version clarifies the domain context (access control), specifies the return type and structure, and provides actionable use cases for AI agents.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all Redis access control rules
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all Redis access control rules configured in the account. Returns an array of Redis rules with their identifiers, names, permissions, and associated resources. Use this operation to audit existing access control configurations or to retrieve rule details before modifying or deleting them.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and overly vague. They lack context about what Redis rules are (access control rules), what the operation returns (array of rules with details), and when an AI agent should use this operation. Enhanced version clarifies the domain context (access control), specifies the return type and structure, and provides actionable use cases for AI agents.

Use this operation to track account activity, investigate changes, or generate compliance reports.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new Redis Cloud subscription
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Redis Cloud subscription with the specified configuration. Accepts a CreateSubscriptionRequest containing subscription parameters such as name, cloud provider, region, and plan details.
